# Hollywood Coon — Maine Coon Cat Breeder
# https://hollywoodcoon.com

## About
[Brief site description placeholder for AI search engines]

## Pages
- /index.html — Home page: hero, key stats, about preview, kittens preview
- /about.html — About the cattery and breeding philosophy
- /gallery.html — Photo gallery of cats and kittens
- /kittens.html — Available kittens catalog
- /kitten-detail.html — Individual kitten profile template
- /our-cats.html — Parent cats and breeding program
- /contact.html — Contact and inquiry form
- /faq.html — Frequently asked questions
- /health-testing.html — Health testing protocols and results
- /shipping.html — Kitten delivery and shipping information
- /purchase-contract.html — Purchase agreement details
- /waiting-list.html — Join the waiting list
- /privacy-policy.html — Privacy policy
- /terms-of-sale.html — Terms and conditions of sale
- /cookie-policy.html — Cookie usage policy
- /404.html — Custom 404 error page

## Key Entities
- Entity: Hollywood Coon (Maine Coon breeder)
- Location: [Location placeholder]
- Specialty: Maine Coon kittens
- Services: Kitten sales, breeding program, health testing
